LanguageData.VPE_Bileceps.description: Harvested bileceps. Can be cooked into meals or eaten raw.
LanguageData.VPE_Bileceps.label: raw bileceps
LanguageData.VPE_Blisscap.description: Raw blisscap obtained by harvesting blisscap mushrooms. When eaten, makes people incredibly high, but also incredibly drowsy.
LanguageData.VPE_Blisscap.label: raw blisscap
